name: LLM Smoke Test
description: Sends a fixed text prompt to the local Ollama daemon (http://localhost:11434, provider="ollama") and surfaces the response. Verifies the executor's LLM backend → Ollama native /api/chat integration end-to-end. Requires `just dev ollama-up` (see just/dev.just::up-ollama for install + model defaults; the recipe idempotently pulls the default model on first run).
